task_completion.description: Open FreeCAD and access the gear creation tool or workbench.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD application is open and the workspace shows gear creation tools (e.g., FCGear workbench or Part Design Involute Gear tool).

task_completion.description: Set the gear to have 24 teeth, a 2.0 mm module, and a 20-degree pressure angle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD property panel or gear dialog displays 'Teeth' (or similar) set to 24, 'Module' set to 2.0, and 'Pressure Angle' set to 20.

task_completion.description: Extrude the gear to a thickness of 10 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows a solid 3D gear (not a flat 2D profile) and the property panel for the pad/extrusion/gear shows a height, length, or thickness value of 10 mm.

task_completion.description: Create a 12 mm diameter central bore in the gear.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model shows a circular hole through the center of the gear, and the property panel, hole tool, or sketch shows a diameter of 12 mm (or radius of 6 mm).
A 'Save As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' with the filename 'spur_gear.FCStd', or the FreeCAD window title bar displays 'spur_gear.FCStd' after saving.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeCAD GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and property panels rather than executing a Python script in the terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent created a genuine 3D model in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD 3D viewport displays the rendered gear being actively manipulated or constructed, not just a downloaded image or a pre-existing file being viewed.

integrity.description: The agent constructed the gear step-by-step rather than loading a completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The history tree (Combo View) shows the progression of features (e.g., Gear profile, Pad, Pocket/Hole) being added, rather than a fully finished file being opened at the start.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected file is 'spur_gear.FCStd' saved in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/. The gear must have 24 teeth, a module of 2.0 mm, and a 20-degree pressure angle. The extrusion height/thickness must be exactly 10.0 mm. The central bore must have a 12 mm diameter (6 mm radius). A correctly generated gear with these parameters will have a tip diameter (bounding box XY) of 52.0 mm, a pitch diameter of 48.0 mm, and a root diameter of approximately 43.0 mm.
